sentences.arabic: اشْتَكَى رَامِيٌّ مِنْ أَلَمٍ فِي الظَّهْرِ.
sentences.translation: Rami se žalio na bol u leđima.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ الطَّبِيبُ إِنَّهُ يَجْلِسُ كَثِيرًا أَمَامَ الْحَاسُوبِ.
sentences.translation: Ljekar je rekao da previše sjedi ispred računara.
sentences.translationEn: The doctor said he sits too much in front of the computer.

sentences.translation: Savjetovao ga je da stane i pruži se svaki sat.
sentences.translationEn: He advised him to stand up and stretch every hour.

sentences.arabic: بَدَأَ رَامِيٌّ يَقُومُ بِتَمَارِينَ خَفِيفَةٍ فِي الْبَيْتِ.
sentences.translation: Rami je počeo raditi lagane vježbe kod kuće.
sentences.translationEn: Rami started doing light exercises at home.
